name: AutoHotkey Desktop Control
summary: Control windows, mouse, and keyboard via scripted commands.

commands.name: window_move
commands.description: Move a window with given title to screen position (x, y).

commands.name: window_resize
commands.description: Resize a window to specified dimensions.

commands.name: key_send
commands.description: Send keystrokes to the active window.

commands.name: mouse_click
commands.description: Click the mouse at screen coordinates.
